final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for the brand RAN QIU, evoking warm autumnal poetry and Eastern minimalist aesthetics.

Style/medium: flat editorial poster with Eastern minimalist sensibility, generous negative space, inspired by Japanese wabi-sabi and Chinese ink-wash restraint
Composition: centered vertical layout with ample breathing room, shallow depth of field implied through soft background blur, golden-hour warmth permeating the frame
Subject: brand mark "RAN QIU" as the visual anchor, surrounded by sparse natural elements — fallen leaves, dried botanicals, or soft branch silhouettes — arranged with intentional negative space
Scene/backdrop: abstract warm autumnal setting, minimal environmental cues, soft unfocused background in #E8DCCB (beige) tones
Lighting/mood: golden-hour diffused light, warm and healing, quiet and poetic — no harsh shadows, soft directional glow suggesting late afternoon sun
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red) as the dominant brand anchor, #E8DCCB (beige) as the expansive negative-space base, #D4A574 (golden tan) as the warm accent; colors relate as earth-tone triad with the beige providing silence and the brown-red providing voice
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain or linen texture on background, delicate organic textures on botanical elements
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: brand mark "RAN QIU" must be clearly legible; color palette must stay within the three specified hex tones; negative space must occupy at least 50% of the composition; no busy ornamentation
Avoid: neon or cool-toned accents, symmetrical floral overload, Western luxury poster clichés, cluttered layouts, gradients outside the specified palette, generic stock-photo autumn scenes
